title: JOB ALERT – FEEDX POLYTECHNIC COMMUNITY 🚨
description:
JOB ALERT – FEEDX POLYTECHNIC COMMUNITY 🚨
A great opportunity for Mechanical / ITI / Polytechnic students & experienced candidates 👇
🔧 Open Positions:
* Fitters
* Fabrication Technicians
* MIG Welders
🏗️ Industry: Pre-Engineered Buildings / Railways
📍 Location: Patancheru & Sadashivpet (near Hyderabad)
🎓 Qualification: ITI / Diploma / Polytechnic (Mechanical)
💰 Salary: Up to ₹35,000 per month
⏰ Duty: 12 Hours
🏠 Facilities: Lodging, Boarding, Canteen & Room Facility
🎯 Eligibility:
* Relevant experience required
* Immediate joiners preferred
📞 HR Contact: Prachi Rastogi
📱 9220544313
📧 tslprachi@gmail.com
🔗 Interview Updates WhatsApp Group:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/E1gB7kvPl1y9lE3IrRVlDi
👉 Interested candidates apply directly or refer friends who need a job.

title: 📢 Official Notice: TG ECET 2026 Examination Schedule
description:
📢 Official Notice: TG ECET 2026 Examination Schedule

The Telangana State Common Entrance Test for Lateral Entry into B.E., B.Tech., and B.Pharmacy programmes (TG ECET 2026) has been scheduled.

📅 Examination Date: 15th May 2026
🎓Conducting University: Osmania University

All eligible diploma students are advised to prepare systematically, stay updated with official notifications, and ensure timely completion of exam-related formalities.

Wishing all aspirants the very best in their preparation and future academic progression.🤝

— FEEDX Polytechnic Community!

title: 📢 TSRTC Supervisor Trainee Jobs Notification
description:
*📢 TSRTC Supervisor Trainee Jobs Notification*

Organization: Telangana State Road Transport Corporation (TSRTC)

*Recruitment Board:* Telangana State Level Police Recruitment Board (TSLPRB)

*Notification Date:* 25 December 2025

*Post Name:*

Traffic Supervisor Trainee (TST)

Mechanical Supervisor Trainee (MST)

📊 *Vacancies*

Traffic Supervisor Trainee (TST): *84 posts*

Mechanical Supervisor Trainee (MST): *114 posts*

Total Vacancies: *198*

💰 Pay Scale
*₹27,080 – ₹84,400*

🗓️ *Important Application Dates*

Online Application Start *Date:* 30 December 2025 (from 8:00 AM)

*Last Date:* Not clearly visible in the picture (check official TSLPRB notification for confirmation)

📝 *Mode of Application*

Online only through *TSLPRB website*

Candidates must check eligibility before applying.

*-FEEDX Polytechnic Community*

title: 📢 NCERT Recruitment Notification – 173 Posts
description:
*📢 NCERT Recruitment Notification – 173 Posts*

NCERT has released a recruitment notification for *173 Group A, B, and C posts.*

*📅 Application Dates:*
Online applications are open from *December 27 to January 16.*

*🎓 Eligible Qualifications:*
Candidates with the following qualifications can apply:
• 10th Pass
• Intermediate
• ITI
• *Diploma*
• Degree
• Post Graduation
• B.Tech / M.Tech
• MBA
• B.Lib.Sc / M.Lib.Sc

*📝 Selection Process:*
• Written Test
• Interview

*🌐 Official Application Link:*
👉 https://ncert.ncert.org.in/vacancies.php?ln=en
Eligible candidates are advised to visit the official website and apply before the last date.

*— FEEDX Polytechnic Community 💙*
